introSection: Rockin Roller is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Fabbri currently located at Botton's Pleasure Beach in Skegness, Lincolnshire, England, UK.
fullText: Rockin Roller is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Fabbri currently located at Botton's Pleasure Beach in Skegness, Lincolnshire, England, UK.
